---
title: "Presentation"
author: "Tin Nguyen, Waranya Ratirotjanakul, Amisha Vatsa, Inayat Gill"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    controls: true
    theme: simple
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
    code-line-numbers: false
    highlight-style: github
---
